caption: A series of news broadcast frames depicts a formal event. In the early frames, a man in a dark suit is handing a white document to another man wearing a light-grey traditional Indian outfit. They are surrounded by other men, including one in a light-tan jacket and another in a military-style cap. The scene shifts to a wider shot of a stage with a red curtain backdrop. A man in a black military uniform and turban stands to the left, while the man in the dark suit stands centrally, gesturing with his hands. To the right, a guard in a red ceremonial uniform and gold headgear stands at attention near a metallic stand. A red and white news ticker at the bottom of every frame reads "जे. पी. नड्डा: नीतीश का वापस आना सुखद समाचार है" and "10:01 PM". A top banner reads "कांग्रेस चटपटाई, तेजस्वी की ‘पिक्चर’ बाकी है" alongside the "NEWS 18 इंडिया" logo.
